---
title: "Integration Test Run — {YYYY-MM-DD}"
date: YYYY-MM-DD
categories: [integration-run]
status: pass          # pass | fail | partial-pass | in-progress
branch: "main"        # or feature branch name if testing against a branch
---

<!--
TEMPLATE — copy to testing-log/{date}-integration-run.qmd.
Fill in the profile(s) tested, paste the test runner output, and set status:.
See docs/testing-workflow.qmd for when and how to add an integration run entry.
-->

Brief summary: which profiles were run, on what hardware (local/HPC), and overall outcome.

**Summary:**

| Profile | Pipeline | Integration tests |
|---------|----------|-------------------|
| `test` | ✓ / ✗ | ✓ PASS / ✗ FAIL |
| `test_variable` | ✓ / ✗ | ✓ PASS / ✗ FAIL |
| `test_three_species` | ✓ / ✗ | ✓ PASS / ✗ FAIL |
| `test_cv_pool` | ✓ / ✗ | ✓ PASS / ✗ FAIL |

---

## Environment

```bash
#| eval: false
export NXF_VER=24.10.5
nextflow -version
```

Platform: local Docker / Rockfish Singularity
Nextflow version:

::: {.callout-note collapse="true" title="Output"}
``` text
[paste output here]
```
:::

---

## Collect Test Data

```bash
#| eval: false
bash tests/collect_test_data.sh --profile test
bash tests/collect_test_data.sh --profile test_variable
# Add other profiles as needed
```

For HPC runs, sync after collection:

```bash
#| eval: false
rsync -av --delete \
  rmckeow1@login.rockfish.jhu.edu:/vast/eande106/projects/Ryan/simulation_pipeline/nemascan-sims-nf/tests/integration_data/ \
  tests/integration_data/
```

---

## Integration Test Results

### `test` profile

```bash
#| eval: false
TEST_DB_DIR=tests/integration_data/test/db \
TEST_WORK_DIR=tests/integration_data/test/work \
TEST_LEGACY_ASSESSMENT=tests/integration_data/test/simulation_assessment_results.tsv \
TEST_DB_ASSESSMENT=tests/integration_data/test/db_simulation_assessment_results.tsv \
Rscript tests/run_tests.R
```

::: {.callout-note collapse="true" title="Output"}
``` text
[paste output here]
```
:::

Result: <!-- PASS / FAIL -->

### `test_variable` profile

```bash
#| eval: false
TEST_DB_DIR=tests/integration_data/test_variable/db \
TEST_WORK_DIR=tests/integration_data/test_variable/work \
TEST_LEGACY_ASSESSMENT=tests/integration_data/test_variable/simulation_assessment_results.tsv \
TEST_DB_ASSESSMENT=tests/integration_data/test_variable/db_simulation_assessment_results.tsv \
TEST_EXPECTED_MAPPINGS=256 \
Rscript tests/run_tests.R
```

::: {.callout-note collapse="true" title="Output"}
``` text
[paste output here]
```
:::

Result: <!-- PASS / FAIL -->

### `test_three_species` profile

```bash
#| eval: false
TEST_DB_DIR=tests/integration_data/test_three_species/db \
TEST_WORK_DIR=tests/integration_data/test_three_species/work \
TEST_LEGACY_ASSESSMENT=tests/integration_data/test_three_species/simulation_assessment_results.tsv \
TEST_DB_ASSESSMENT=tests/integration_data/test_three_species/db_simulation_assessment_results.tsv \
TEST_EXPECTED_MAPPINGS=36 \
TEST_EXPECTED_MARKER_SETS=9 \
TEST_POPULATION=ce.test \
TEST_EXPECTED_POPULATIONS=ce.test,ce.test.popA,ce.test.popB,cb.test,cb.test.popA,cb.test.popB,ct.test,ct.test.popA,ct.test.popB \
Rscript tests/run_tests.R
```

::: {.callout-note collapse="true" title="Output"}
``` text
[paste output here]
```
:::

Result: <!-- PASS / FAIL -->

### `test_cv_pool` profile

```bash
#| eval: false
TEST_DB_DIR=tests/integration_data/test_cv_pool/db \
TEST_WORK_DIR=tests/integration_data/test_cv_pool/work \
TEST_DB_ASSESSMENT=tests/integration_data/test_cv_pool/db_simulation_assessment_results.tsv \
TEST_CV_POOL=true \
Rscript tests/run_tests.R
```

::: {.callout-note collapse="true" title="Output"}
``` text
[paste output here]
```
:::

Result: <!-- PASS / FAIL -->

---

## Notes

<!-- Any failures, unexpected skips, or deviations from the standard workflow. -->
